name: Olivia Halford - Your Crippled Gator Girl
description:
WE HUGGIN THAT GATOR! Olivia Halford in ALL her glory!

I've spent the entire day making Olivia as perfect as possible. I wanted to give everyone a similar experience to that of the official game.

You start almost similarly to that of the game. I kept things unique and the intro is not a boring carbon copy. I do hope this will leaving a lasting impact on you. Just as it did for me when I first played it. Chub version over here!

I made complete sure her personality, appearance, and of course her disability are exactly how you see in game. I faithfully believe she is as perfect as she can be.

DO NOT BE AFRAID TO TELL ME IF MISSED ANYTHING!
If I added too much, too little, forgot to specify this or that, TELL ME!
Do not be afraid to state any issues you might encounter!
I am MORE THAN WILLING to make adjustments if need be!

Fun fact. First time I made this, she had 7304 tokens (3935 Permanent). This version you see now has been trimmed and summarized to avoid bloating.

You can view the Google Doc of the bloated definitions here, includes everything, even the first message. Includes the Trimmed version as well.

Art section (includes memes)
creator: This_Dude0012
